narration_text: Now we'll see how access networks and internet service providers interact. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the nodes at each level are connected, forming a complex network. I want you to focus on the regional networks that arise to connect access nets to ISPs, and how they enable communication between different parts of the network. Notice the role of internet exchange points, or IXPs, in facilitating this communication. Let's think about this together, considering how these components work together to provide internet access. As we examine this diagram, we can see the relationships between access nets, ISPs, and regional networks, setting the stage for our next topic.
